things.name: Kuwait Towers
things.description: Iconic 1977 trio of water towers - symbols of Kuwait with viewing sphere and restaurant

things.name: Grand Mosque (Masjid Al Kabeer)
things.description: Kuwait's largest mosque with a capacity of 10,000 and a beautiful 43m dome

things.name: Souq Mubarakiya
things.description: Kuwait's oldest traditional market with spices, gold, perfumes and Kuwaiti street food

things.name: Kuwait National Museum
things.description: Kuwait's history from Neolithic Failaka Island to independence and the Gulf War

things.name: National Assembly Building
things.description: Jorn Utzon's striking 1972 parliament building - one of the architect's finest works

things.name: Failaka Island
things.description: Island with Bronze Age ruins, a Greek colony and a memorial to the Iraqi occupation

things.name: The Avenues Mall
things.description: One of the largest shopping malls in the Middle East with 1,500 shops

things.name: Scientific Center Kuwait
things.description: Marine and natural history museum with an IMAX cinema and the largest aquarium in the Gulf

things.name: Liberation Tower
things.description: 372m telecom tower built after liberation from Iraqi occupation with a rotating restaurant

things.name: Seif Palace Waterfront
things.description: Government palace on the waterfront with traditional Arabic-Islamic architecture
